quoteLast: ; whilst at the same time, the 23rd degree of Libra is almost on the _Horizon obliquus_ on the Eastern side.

quoteLast: , the altitude of Sirius is very nearly 18°, and the 23rd of Libra is very near the Eastern horizon.
